parents.subject: LU-14719 lod: distributed transaction check space

commit.subject: LU-14719 tests: fix replay-single/111g version check
commit.message:
LU-14719 tests: fix replay-single/111g version check

Fix syntax error in version check.

Fixes: 6aee406c84 ("LU-14719 lod: distributed transaction check space")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=replay-single env=ONLY=111 mdscount=4
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I89219d7a8290dc92c8d371e4e7eacdb29e3ebbe5
